description: You are a professional astrophotographer at ESO's Paranal Observatory in Chile planning a deep-sky imaging session for July 16, 2023, at 01:00 UTC. Capture screenshots of NGC 3372, NGC 5128, and NGC 5139 to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/ using the location coordinates provided in /home/ga/data/observatory_locations.json. The simulation must show pure sky conditions without atmosphere or ground obstructions and include the equatorial coordinate grid. Document the target names and observation date in a session notes file at /home/ga/Desktop/session_notes.txt.

metadata.data_source: IAU Minor Planet Center Observatory Codes, ESO official site
